scope: Breakdance Elements for Oxygen + Breakdance Forms for Oxygen css.twig design paths

statuses.native-shared-mapper: A shared mapper can represent this property family, but CSS fallback is not strip-safe until the element/property pair has compile proof.
statuses.native-with-guardrails: A native mapper exists only with element-specific guardrails because some persisted JSON properties do not compile.
statuses.element-specific-contract: A reviewed element-specific mapper/fallback contract exists for this element and path family. CSS fallback remains unless stripSafe proof is attached.
statuses.content-or-render-runtime: The path affects content, runtime rendering, or an element-specific renderer rather than direct CSS declaration mapping.
statuses.requires-css-fallback: The path requires source CSS fallback unless a dedicated mapper and compile proof are added.
statuses.needs-element-specific-mapper: The path is known from source contracts but has no declared mapper contract yet.

stripSafeRequires: source contract path is covered by an explicit rule
CSS declaration to Oxygen/Breakdance JSON path is documented
compiled CSS or rendered page proof exists for the target element/property pair
audit proves the source CSS declaration was consumed without dead writes

elementRules.reason: Mini Cart cart/offcanvas paths target generated WooCommerce cart descendants and CSS custom properties; handled by the Mini Cart element-specific contract backlog.
Mini Cart link/toggle paths target nested toggle icon, subtotal, and counter descendants including hover states; handled by the Mini Cart element-specific contract backlog.
Pricing Table container shadow renders on the table wrapper and needs Pricing Table element-specific selector proof.
Pricing Table featured/accent values drive generated accent label and featured wrapper selectors.
Pricing Table content alignment targets internal content layout rather than the outer element box.
Pricing Table accent paths render via accent label declarations and macros.
Pricing Table price paths target nested amount, currency, period, badge, and nudge selectors.
Pricing Table feature paths target generated feature row/icon descendants.
Pricing Table button styling is delegated through the atom button macro and needs Pricing Table-specific proof.
Woo Product Images sale badge paths target generated WooCommerce sale badge descendants and positioning.
Woo Product Images zoom icon paths target generated zoom icon descendants including hover state selectors.
Woo Product Images image border paths target product gallery image wrappers and need element-specific proof.
Woo Product Images thumbnail paths target generated gallery thumbnail descendants, active state, and hover state selectors.
Posts List post paths target generated post-card descendants including image, meta, taxonomy, content, and button subparts.
Popup overlay paths target the generated popup overlay and runtime popup wrapper.
Popup panel paths target generated popup panel positioning, size, layout, background, border, and padding controls.
Popup close button paths target generated close button descendants including hover states.
Scroll Progress tracker paths target generated line/circle progress descendants and percentage text.
Scroll Progress container paths control fixed/sticky placement and offsets for the generated progress indicator.
Countdown Timer timer paths target generated timer alignment, divider, and label descendants.
Countdown Timer digit paths target generated default, donut, and flip digit renderers.
Header Builder sticky paths target sticky header runtime behavior, generated sticky styles, scroll behavior, and sticky positioning.
Header Builder overlay paths target generated overlay header runtime behavior and z-index styling.
Header Builder size paths target custom header width controls on the generated header wrapper.
Back To Top button paths target generated button, icon, progress, and hover state descendants.
Back To Top container paths control sticky placement and alignment for the generated floating button.
Simple Testimonial image paths target generated image size, outline, shape, shadow, and filter controls through custom properties and descendant CSS.
Simple Testimonial quote paths target generated quote mark icon size, color, offsets, and responsive visibility descendants.
Gallery image paths target generated image wrappers for opacity, transition, shadow, borders, background, filters, and hover variants.
Gallery caption paths target generated caption overlays for visibility, transition, background, typography, padding, and responsive hiding.
Gallery lightbox is an element runtime contract, not a shared native selector style property.
Table Of Contents header paths target the generated collapsible header, icon, typography, padding, background, and disable behavior.
Table Of Contents list paths target generated list bars, active item state, indentation, spacing, typography, and style variants.
Table Of Contents content alignment targets the generated TOC container layout contract.
Image Accordion image paths target generated accordion panels for transition, shadow, radius, hover expansion, scale, and overlay variants.
Image Accordion content paths target generated icon, title, text, hover visibility, typography, and content hover effects.
Image element paths target generated media sizing, aspect ratio, object fit, object position, and custom ratio controls.
Image element effects paths target generated filter, opacity, blend mode, transition, and hover effect CSS.
Social Share position paths target generated alignment, placement, and floating share bar positioning.
Social Share button paths target generated share button icon sizing, padding, border, colors, and hover variants.
Social Share style paths control generated share button layout and display variants.
Woo Shop Filters chip paths target generated active/filter chips for background, hover, typography, spacing, padding, borders, and shadow.
Woo Shop Filters rating paths target generated rating filter stars and spacing controls.
Woo Shop Filters active filter paths target generated active filter spacing controls.
Fancy Testimonial wrapper paths target generated testimonial card boxing, background, padding, and borders.
Fancy Testimonial image paths target generated testimonial media position, size, and border controls.
Fancy Testimonial quote paths target generated quote icon color and size controls.
Fancy Testimonial star paths target generated rating star position, size, and color controls.
Fancy Testimonial button is an element-local generated button contract.
FAQ wrapper paths target generated FAQ width and background controls.
FAQ item paths target generated question item padding, transition, spacing, background, active state, icon, and button controls.
Image Box container paths target generated content padding and content positioning controls.
Image Box image paths target generated media position, alignment, size, border, shadow, object fit, and object position controls.
Image Box button is an element-local generated button contract.
Content Toggle switch paths target generated toggle dimensions, padding, radius, vertical placement, background, thumb, and active state controls.
Content Toggle label paths target generated toggle label typography and active color controls.
Social Icons icon paths target generated icon shape, background, radius, padding, border, size, color, and hover variants.
Social Icons effect paths target generated transition, opacity, scale-on-hover, and hover opacity controls.
Fancy Divider paths target generated divider style, width, and pattern size/color/amount controls.
Fancy Divider content paths target generated divider label spacing, position, typography, size, color, borders, and width.
Progress Bar container paths target generated track radius, background color, and stripe disable controls.
Progress Bar fill paths target generated progress background, radius, and padding controls.
Progress Bar animation paths target generated stripe animation, scroll-triggered animation, and transition duration controls.
Animated Heading effect paths target generated rotating and typing effect type, duration, background, spacing, transform origin, typography, and cursor controls.
Comments List paths target generated comment avatar, border, padding, background, arrow, and spacing controls.
Tooltip paths target generated tooltip arrow, background, radius, padding, and rich typography descendant controls.
Basic List paths target generated list marker type, marker content, marker width, colors, hover color, indentation, and item spacing controls.
Masker paths target generated CSS mask shape, custom URL, repeat, position, size, and custom size controls.
Scrolling Image image paths target generated scrolling media dimensions, duration, and borders.
Scrolling Image caption paths target generated caption position, spacing, background, width, and typography.
Logo List paths target generated list width, type, alignment, vertical gaps, gradient overlay, and animation duration controls.
Logo List logo paths target generated logo sizing controls.
Business Hours container paths target generated wrapper shadow controls.
Business Hours row paths target generated row padding, alternating/accent backgrounds, borders, and border colors.
Image Comparison container paths target generated comparison wrapper max-width controls.
Image Comparison separator paths target generated divider width and color controls.
Image Comparison label paths target generated before/after label background, padding, typography, and position.
Product Reviews paths target generated review stars, avatar, separator visibility, color, and width controls.
Star Rating star paths target generated star colors, gap, and size controls.
Star Rating label paths target generated label position, typography, and vertical layout controls.
Basic Slider size paths target generated slider custom height controls.
Basic Slider slide paths target generated slide padding, child alignment, vertical alignment, and content width controls.
Basic Slider button is an element-local generated button contract.
Content Reveal overlay paths target generated overlay gradient, vertical alignment, and reveal button controls.
Content Reveal content paths target generated transition and max-width controls.
Notification Bar box paths target generated width, padding, background, accent, border width, and radius controls.
Section size paths target generated viewport, custom height, and container width section controls.
Section button paths target generated primary and secondary section button contracts.
Section divider paths target generated section shape divider contracts.
Woo Checkout paths target generated checkout sub-section contracts for coupon, billing, shipping, additional info, totals, and payment blocks.
Grid paths target generated item count, item alignment, item spacing, and original-dimension layout controls.
Image Hover Card effect paths target generated transition, border width, and border color controls.
Image Hover Card overlay paths target generated overlay opacity and color controls.
Post Meta container paths target generated metadata alignment controls.
Post Meta graphics paths target generated author avatar and icon sizing, radius, and visibility controls.
Pulse Dot paths target generated dot size, color, animation duration, pulse scale, and radius controls.
Simple Counter wrapper paths target generated counter alignment, width, padding, borders, and background controls.
Stats Grid item paths target generated item alignment, background, borders, padding, and shadow controls.
Woo Product Meta container paths target generated layout and divider controls.
Woo Shop Page product list paths target generated product list elements, layout, product wrapper, and button style contracts.
Woo Shop Page result count paths target generated result count typography controls.
Author image paths target generated author image size and radius controls.
Author link paths target generated all-posts and website link contracts.
Badge paths target generated badge background, padding, border, and radius controls.
Button paths target generated button style, custom full-width breakpoint, and button design contract.
Button lightbox is an element runtime contract, not a shared native selector style property.
Code Block wrapper paths target generated code wrapper width, background, borders, and padding controls.
Menu Custom Area dropdown paths target generated dropdown, columns, links, and additional section contracts.
Tab Link design paths target generated tab typography, flex layout, background, and spacing controls.
Video container paths target generated overlay controls.
Video lazy-load paths target generated play icon color, size, and hover color controls.
Woo Widget general paths target generated widget border controls.
Woo Widget title paths target generated title visibility, typography, and spacing controls.
Woo Account Page content paths target generated account content background, padding, borders, and global-style override controls.
Woo Product Info style paths target generated info width, heading visibility, separators, and separator visibility controls.
Wrapper Link container paths target generated transition, hover transition, hover border color, and hover shadow controls.
Adjacent Posts arrow paths target generated arrow size, color, and hover color controls.
Blockquote quote paths target generated quote color, size, and alignment controls.
Circle Counter size paths target generated counter size controls.
Circle Counter style paths target generated value position and spacing controls.
Dual Heading paths target generated combined, primary, and secondary heading typography contracts.
Icon Box container paths target generated shadow and alignment controls.
Icon Box button is an element-local generated button contract.
Image With Zoom effect paths target generated cursor, transition duration, and zoom scale controls.
Menu Dropdown paths target generated columns, links, and additional section dropdown contracts.
Related Products container paths target generated product grid sizing controls.
Related Products title paths target generated title visibility and typography controls.
Upsell Products container paths target generated product grid sizing controls.
Upsell Products title paths target generated title visibility and typography controls.
Woo Shopping Cart paths target generated cart contents, totals, and cross-sell block contracts.
Breadcrumbs paths target generated breadcrumb spacing controls.
Breadcrumbs container content alignment targets the generated breadcrumbs container contract.
Woo Cart Cross Sells paths target generated cross-sell block and slider layout contracts.
Woo Cart Totals paths target generated totals block and title visibility contracts.
Woo Product Cart Button paths target generated add-to-cart button contracts.
Woo Product Cart Button size paths target generated button fill-container behavior.
Woo Product Rating star paths target generated star color and size controls.
Advanced Slider container paths target generated custom-height controls.
Column order paths target generated responsive ordering controls.
Comment Form container paths target generated form container contracts.
Form Builder container paths target generated form container contracts.
Instagram Post paths target generated post width controls.
Login Form container paths target generated form container contracts.
Lottie Animation wrapper paths target generated animation wrapper width controls.
Product image paths target generated product image positioning controls.
Register Form container paths target generated form container contracts.
Tabs content paths target generated tab content contracts.
Text Link lightbox is an element runtime contract, not a shared native selector style property.
Woo Checkout Billing Form paths target generated billing details form contracts.
Woo Checkout Payment paths target generated payment block contracts.
Woo Checkout Shipping Form paths target generated shipping address form contracts.
Woo Product Stock paths target generated in-stock display contracts.

guardrails: EssentialElements\Column alignment must emit align_items, align, and vertical_align together.
EssentialElements\Columns layout.justify_content is a dead write and must keep CSS fallback.
container.margin left/right auto on EssentialElements\Columns/Column is a dead write and must keep CSS fallback.

rules.reason: Whole design object is passed into Oxygen/Breakdance runtime macros; individual referenced subpaths must carry the concrete mapper/fallback status.
Oxygen Dynamic Data Loop item styling targets generated loop-item descendants for background, borders, and padding.
Oxygen Posts/Term Loop post styling targets generated loop-item descendants for background, borders, and padding.
Oxygen oEmbed iframe sizing and aspect-ratio paths target the generated oEmbed wrapper and iframe contract.
Button-like subcontrols often map to nested atom button presets or generated descendants, not the wrapper box.
Mini Cart and cart page subparts target nested WooCommerce/cart descendants and require element-specific mappers.
Unclassified container subpaths are element-specific. More specific shared container rules above still win for padding, borders, background, size, and guarded margin.
Image subparts can target generated img wrappers, thumbnails, overlay icons, or product media children.
Generic design.size paths are element-specific unless a more specific shared size rule above matches.
